'''鈭歞-ng-v-dh''' ('''kadangvedhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jazz|jazz]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-ng-v-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jazz|jazz]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞-ng-v-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kadangvedhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidangvedhoko|thidangvedhoko]] || [[word:jidangvedhoko|jidangvedhoko]] || [[word:shidangvedhoko|shidangvedhoko]] || [[word:kidangvedhoko|kidangvedhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudangvedhoko|thuthudangvedhoko]] || [[word:jujudangvedhoko|jujudangvedhoko]] || [[word:shushudangvedhoko|shushudangvedhoko]] || [[word:kukudangvedhoko|kukudangvedhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudangvedhoko|thudangvedhoko]] || [[word:judangvedhoko|judangvedhoko]] || [[word:shudangvedhoko|shudangvedhoko]] || [[word:kudangvedhoko|kudangvedhoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodangvedhoko|thodangvedhoko]] || [[word:jodangvedhoko|jodangvedhoko]] || [[word:shodangvedhoko|shodangvedhoko]] || [[word:kodangvedhoko|kodangvedhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodangvedhoko|thodangvedhoko]] || [[word:jodangvedhoko|jodangvedhoko]] || [[word:shodangvedhoko|shodangvedhoko]] || [[word:kodangvedhoko|kodangvedhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dangvedhoko|th忙dangvedhoko]] || [[word:j忙dangvedhoko|j忙dangvedhoko]] || [[word:sh忙dangvedhoko|sh忙dangvedhoko]] || [[word:k忙dangvedhoko|k忙dangvedhoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadangvedhoko|thadangvedhoko]] || [[word:jadangvedhoko|jadangvedhoko]] || [[word:shadangvedhoko|shadangvedhoko]] || [[word:kadangvedhoko|kadangvedhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadangvedhoko|thadangvedhoko]] || [[word:jadangvedhoko|jadangvedhoko]] || [[word:shadangvedhoko|shadangvedhoko]] || [[word:kadangvedhoko|kadangvedhoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
